title: Stew's Up
description: Mod that adds a couple of stew-related features.
body:
# Features:

 
## Golden Stew:

Golden Stew, when eaten, will give you 6 food, 0.6 saturation, as well as 30 seconds of Absorption III and 10 seconds of Regeneration II.
 
## Enchanted Golden Stew:

Eating Enchanted Golden Stew will give you 12 food, 1.6 saturation, 60 seconds of Absorption V, Resistance II, and Fire Resistance, and 30 seconds of Speed II and Regeneration III.

 
## Shulker Bowl:

Crafting any type of stew with a Shulker Shell will pour the stew into the Shell, allowing you to store much more stew in a single bowl, and mix & match different stews with different effects.

Eligible stews are defined by the tag "#stewsup:stews".
